title: End-to-end integration: all optimizations + regression tests
description:
Integration task that verifies all Phase 4 optimizations work together and existing Phase 3 tests still pass.

1. Update `examples/model_benchmark.rs` to report Phase 4 metrics: SIMD prefill tok/s, KV-cache decode tok/s, memory usage
2. Update `bench_vs_llamacpp.sh` to include Synapse Phase 4 numbers
3. Run full test suite and fix any regressions:
   - `cargo test -p synapse-inference` — all existing tests pass
   - `cargo test --test inference_e2e` — end-to-end inference works
   - `cargo test --test kvcache_correctness` — existing KV-cache tests pass
   - `cargo test --test prefill_throughput` — prefill benchmark
4. Verify overall targets:
   - CPU-SIMD decode ≥ 5 tok/s on Qwen3-0.6B (from 0.3)
   - CPU-SIMD prefill ≥ 50 tok/s on Qwen3-0.6B pp128 (from 5)
   - Metal decode ≥ 30 tok/s (if Metal feature enabled)
   - llama.cpp gap ≤ 5× (from ~270×)

**Tests:** Regression testing + benchmark verification.
